IMPLEMENTATION:
- Created chart_generators/ package with base class pattern
- BaseStrategyChartGenerator: Contains all current chart logic \(unchanged\)
- SingleLegChartGenerator: For Long Call/Long Put \(no overrides - inherits all\)
- SpreadChartGenerator: For spreads \(no overrides - placeholder for future\)
- Factory pattern: get_chart_generator\(\) selects appropriate generator

SAFETY GUARANTEES:
- Long Call and Long Put use SingleLegChartGenerator with zero overrides
- All existing chart generation logic preserved in base class
- One strategy''s future customizations won''t affect others
- Tests confirm no regression \(71 passed\)

ARCHITECTURE:
- Service layer creates generator per-signal using factory
- Centralized strategy-to-generator mapping
- Easy to add new strategy types without touching existing code
